Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: A financial transaction representing either income or an expense.

userId.description: The UID of the user who created the transaction.

amount.description: The monetary amount of the transaction. Must be positive.

category.description: The category of the transaction (e.g., Groceries, Salary).

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

date.description: The date of the transaction in YYYY-MM-DD format.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the transaction was created.
